title: 2026 AI Engineer Vibe Reel
summary: The AI Engineer channel is promoting the World's Fair event scheduled for San Francisco from June 29 to July 2, 2026. Tickets and schedule information are available at ai.engineer/wf.
writeup: This video is a promotional reel for the AI Engineer World's Fair, set for San Francisco from June 29 to July 2, 2026. It points viewers to ai.engineer/wf for tickets and schedule information. The clip functions as event marketing rather than technical content.
